name: pheno-compose
absorption_note: Federated crate of phenotype-infra (ADR-049). The composition framework from the standalone PhenoCompose repo (Dmouse92 archive 2026-06-17) was consolidated into phenotype-infra/crates/pheno-compose-driver; this crate exposes the underlying library surface (lib target) that the driver binary wraps. Pairs with pheno-config via the ComposePort + ConfigPort traits.
rationale: Canonical composition library inside phenotype-infra. Supersedes the standalone phenocompose repo (archived 2026-06-17 per ADR-049). Consumed by pheno-compose-driver (CLI), pheno-config (typed inputs), and downstream callers. Local-only sibling — no standalone GitHub target; canonical path is phenotype-infra/crates/pheno-compose.
note: Federated crate (2026-06-24 registry sync). Tracked at the workspace-crate level so pheno-compose resolves independently from pheno-compose-driver. The legacy PhenoCompose standalone repo (projects/phenocompose.json, ARCHIVE_ONLY) retains its disposition history; this entry is the new canonical crate-level artifact.
